\begin{table*}[!t]
\centering
\caption{Verification results on VNN-COMP'25 benchmarks. Each cell reports \emph{\% Solved}\,$\uparrow$ over the breakdown $(\#\,\mathrm{Verified}\,/\,\#\,\mathrm{Falsified})$. \% Solved is the fraction of instances \emph{correctly} decided (Verified UNSAT or Falsified SAT, in agreement with the VNN-COMP'25 ground-truth consensus); the remainder are abstentions or sound errors. A dagger ($\dagger N$) marks cells with $N$ verdicts that disagree with the consensus (sound violation); these $N$ verdicts are excluded from the \% Solved numerator. An em-dash ($-$) indicates the verifier's loader does not support the network or the benchmark was not run. ``Ours'' is highlighted at the top; the middle block lists deterministic sound verifiers; the bottom block lists probabilistic verifiers.}
\label{tab:main_results}
